mapper.update: UPDATE leave_application SET status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approve_time = NOW(), approve_opinion = #{approveOpinion} WHERE leave_id = #{leaveId}
mapper.select: SELECT la.leave_id, la.emp_id, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, la.leave_type, la.start_date, la.end_date, la.reason, la.status, la.approver_id, a.emp_name AS approver_name, la.approve_time, la.approve_opinion, la.create_time FROM leave_application la JOIN employee e ON la.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN dept d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee a ON la.approver_id = a.emp_id
